markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss StackBlitz's user data and insights to inform GrowthX's strategy for improving Bolt's competitiveness against rivals like Replit and V0.](https://fathom.video/share/zfpGKHj589sGV3c73Gix7SpyU7-hzVxA?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Internal tools/personal utilities are surprisingly popular use cases for Bolt (40% of projects)](https://fathom.video/share/zfpGKHj589sGV3c73Gix7SpyU7-hzVxA?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Early user engagement (first 6 days) strongly predicts long-term retention](https://fathom.video/share/zfpGKHj589sGV3c73Gix7SpyU7-hzVxA?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
  - [Backend complexity correlates more with user satisfaction and retention than frontend complexity](https://fathom.video/share/zfpGKHj589sGV3c73Gix7SpyU7-hzVxA?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)
  - [Integration gaps (e.g., databases, APIs) are major friction points for users](https://fathom.video/share/zfpGKHj589sGV3c73Gix7SpyU7-hzVxA?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Project Plans

  - [Two main projects: comparison pages and template library](https://fathom.video/share/zfpGKHj589sGV3c73Gix7SpyU7-hzVxA?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [Comparison pages: editorial content comparing Bolt to competitors and complementary tools](https://fathom.video/share/zfpGKHj589sGV3c73Gix7SpyU7-hzVxA?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [Template library: 50-100 high-quality, one-shot prompts for various use cases by mid-next week](https://fathom.video/share/zfpGKHj589sGV3c73Gix7SpyU7-hzVxA?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)

### User Behavior and Retention Insights

  - [Early engagement crucial: short messages and usage gaps in first 6 days indicate high churn risk](https://fathom.video/share/zfpGKHj589sGV3c73Gix7SpyU7-hzVxA?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
  - [Deploy failures actually correlate with retention, showing user investment](https://fathom.video/share/zfpGKHj589sGV3c73Gix7SpyU7-hzVxA?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [Backend feature requests indicate friction points (e.g., databases, APIs, analytics)](https://fathom.video/share/zfpGKHj589sGV3c73Gix7SpyU7-hzVxA?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)

### User Segmentation and Use Cases

  - [40% of projects are internal tools/personal utilities (surprising finding)](https://fathom.video/share/zfpGKHj589sGV3c73Gix7SpyU7-hzVxA?tab=summary&timestamp=899.0)
  - [Other common categories: developer tools, landing pages, portfolios](https://fathom.video/share/zfpGKHj589sGV3c73Gix7SpyU7-hzVxA?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
  - [Users generally not opinionated about specific integrations (e.g., Supabase vs. generic database)](https://fathom.video/share/zfpGKHj589sGV3c73Gix7SpyU7-hzVxA?tab=summary&timestamp=1281.0)

### Data Analysis and Sharing

  - [KJ shared user behavior data in a sequentialized format for easy analysis](https://fathom.video/share/zfpGKHj589sGV3c73Gix7SpyU7-hzVxA?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
  - [Will create a tailored report for GrowthX team, focusing on relevant insights](https://fathom.video/share/zfpGKHj589sGV3c73Gix7SpyU7-hzVxA?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

### Qualitative Research

  - [Monica (StackBlitz) conducting surveys; results expected soon](https://fathom.video/share/zfpGKHj589sGV3c73Gix7SpyU7-hzVxA?tab=summary&timestamp=1481.0)
  - [GrowthX offered to assist with additional qualitative research (e.g., jobs-to-be-done interviews)](https://fathom.video/share/zfpGKHj589sGV3c73Gix7SpyU7-hzVxA?tab=summary&timestamp=1610.0)

## Next Steps

  - [KJ to provide examples of project types and more detailed categorization by tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/zfpGKHj589sGV3c73Gix7SpyU7-hzVxA?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)
  - [Set up meeting with Monica to discuss qualitative research findings](https://fathom.video/share/zfpGKHj589sGV3c73Gix7SpyU7-hzVxA?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin developing comparison pages and template library](https://fathom.video/share/zfpGKHj589sGV3c73Gix7SpyU7-hzVxA?tab=summary&timestamp=1595.0)
  - [Explore potential collaboration on further qualitative research (jobs-to-be-done interviews)](https://fathom.video/share/zfpGKHj589sGV3c73Gix7SpyU7-hzVxA?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [GrowthX to analyze shared data for insights to inform marketing language and product strategy](https://fathom.video/share/zfpGKHj589sGV3c73Gix7SpyU7-hzVxA?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)
